payload.answer: I found a conflict. Existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. I did not commit a durable update because this could be either a true contradiction or two different people named Sara. Please clarify whether this is a different Sara or which relationship is correct.

entity_resolution.reason: The name 'Sara' may refer to the same person or to two different people with the same name. If it is the same person, 'daughter' and 'niece' are conflicting relationships.

details: Detected conflict between existing memory and new input.
Escalated for clarification due to possible same-name ambiguity.

repair_options: Clarify whether there are two different people named Sara.
If this is the same Sara, confirm whether she is your daughter or your niece.
Provide a distinguishing identifier for Sara (for example: last name, side of family, or another descriptor).
If the old memory is wrong, explicitly replace it.
